rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE contracts are scoped to component types or implementations based on the annex location
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation-level references in type annexes should be resolved by moving valid bindings to implementation annexes
AGREE syntax requires that all identifiers and types be visible in the current scope and properly declared
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementations may only contain assignments and assume/guarantee statements valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in component implementations instead of component types
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model Analyst extraction of component structure
